programme.title: MasterChef UK Junior Season 01 - EP11
programme.desc: The four remaining chefs must cook lunch for Doctor Who and his companion.

programme.title: MasterChef UK Junior Season 01 - EP12
programme.desc: They must prepare lunch for pop band JLS. Will their food be a hit with the boys?

programme.title: MasterChef UK Junior Season 01 - EP13
programme.desc: The four best chefs battle it out to become crowned Junior Masterchef Champion 2010.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Auditions: Part 1
programme.desc: A few dozen home chefs battle it out in the MasterChef Kitchen to earn the best chef title

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Auditions: Part 2
programme.desc: In their first challenge, the contestants have 75 minutes to make a savoury dish.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Top 24 Mystery Box
programme.desc: The Top 24 contestants enter the MasterChef Australia kitchen for their first mystery box challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Team Challenge: Massimo Bottura
programme.desc: The contestants must break into three teams and battle it out in the first team challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Elimination Challenge: Fish
programme.desc: The eight contestants from the losing team in yesterday's task must face off to stay in the competition.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Mystery Box Challenge & Invention Test: Guilty Pleasures
programme.desc: The mystery box is revealed as today's challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Pressure Test
programme.desc: Three contestants with the least impressive dishes from previous invention test face off.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Immunity Challenge: Jaffle Irona
programme.desc: Today the three best-performing contestants in the invention test will compete for immunity.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Team Challenge: Two-Course Meal for the Army
programme.desc: 22 contestants must team up and cook a two-course meal.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Elimination Challenge
programme.desc: The losing team from yesterday's challenge must cook-off to keep their place in the competition.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Mystery Box Challenge: Five Tastes
programme.desc: The contestants arrive at the MasterChef Australia kitchen to find Marco Pierre White there to greet them.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Pressure Test
programme.desc: Three contestants with the least impressive dish from previous invention test face off in the pressure test.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Immunity Challenge
programme.desc: The three best performers in the invention test are vying for immunity.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Team Challenge: Relay
programme.desc: ll five members of the team with the least impressive dish will go into tomorrow's elimination.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - EP715
programme.desc: The three contestants with the least impressive dishes from the previous invention test face off in the pressure test.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Mystery Box Challenge
programme.desc: The Queen of the Australian kitchen, Maggie Beer returns to the MasterChef Australia kitchen.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Pressure Test
programme.desc: Today's pressure test has been set by a rising star in the dessert world, guest chef Anna.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Immunity Challenge
programme.desc: Guest mentor Shannon Bennett is leading today's challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Off-site Challenge: Abbotsford Convent Bakery
programme.desc: The contestants will be taking over the bakery at Melbourne's iconic Abbotsford Convent.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Elimination Challenge
programme.desc: The losing team of nine cooks face off in the elimination challenge.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP8
programme.desc: Eight $1 million cases are added to a Minnesota woman's game.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP9
programme.desc: Nine $1 million cases are on the line for a New Jersey woman's game.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP10
programme.desc: A hot-dog merchant from Nevada and a teacher from Pennsylvania compete for the top prize.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP11
programme.desc: A teacher from Pennsylvania returns to finish her game.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP12
programme.desc: The game gets hairy for a barber from Ohio, who plays for $2 million.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - Thanksgiving Special - Part 1
programme.desc: A restaurateur competes in a tasty Thanksgiving-themed game worth $2 million. In addition, the case models participate in various eating contests.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - Thanksgiving Special - Part 2
programme.desc: A restaurateur competes in a tasty Thanksgiving-themed game worth $2 million. In addition, the case models participate in various eating contests.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP14
programme.desc: A single mother from the Bronx and a woman from Florida vie for the top prize.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP15
programme.desc: A woman from Florida continues her quest to score the big prize. Then a Minnesota math teacher hopes it will all add up for a million-dollar win.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP16
programme.desc: A Minnesota teacher tries to chalk up a win. Then a part-time bartender from Massachusetts plays, hoping to tap into some cash to open a bar.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP17
programme.desc: Tis the season for a potential million-dollar Christmas. In holiday-themed games, a family from California steps up to play, as does a newly married war hero from Oregon.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP18
programme.desc: A coach from Tennessee tries to score $1 million. Then, a makeup artist from Texas pursues the top prize.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP19
programme.desc: A female drag racer from California revs up to play for the $1 million prize, as does a vivacious farmer-grandmother from Iowa.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP20
programme.desc: A farmer-grandmother from Iowa returns to finish her game. In addition, a Missouri musician tries to hit all the right notes in his bid for the $1 million prize.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP21
programme.desc: A New Jersey workingman plays for big bucks.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP22
programme.desc: 4 contestants, from Ohio, Connecticut and 2 from California - battle it out in a special speed game.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP2
programme.desc: Contestants get a chance to win money, from one penny to $1 million.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP3
programme.desc: Contestants get a chance to win money, from one penny to $1 million.

programme.desc: Contestants get a chance to win money, from one penny to $1 million.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Mystery Box Challenge
programme.desc: The judges tell the 17 contestants to realise their food dreams.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Pressure Test
programme.desc: We say goodbye as one contestant will cook their last dish.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Immunity Challenge: Callum Hann
programme.desc: The three best performers in the invention test are vying for immunity.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Off-site Challenge: Mexican Street Food
programme.desc: This episodes challenge is to cook Mexican street food for a huge crowd of 500 guests.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - EP725
programme.desc: The eight members of the losing team from the Mexican challenge are facing elimination. With 90 minutes on the clock and an open pantry, the contestants must re-invent a classic French dish.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Mystery Box Challenge
programme.desc: The contestants learn that each ingredient costs $1 or less and are given 60 minutes to create a dish.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Pressure Test
programme.desc: In a pressure test like no other, the losing team face off in one of the toughest challenges.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Immunity Challenge: Nick Holloway
programme.desc: The contestant cooking for immunity must face off against Nick Holloway.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Off-site Challenge: Pizzini Wines
programme.desc: The contestants arrive at Pizzini Wines in north-eastern Victoria's beautiful King Valley.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Elimination Challenge
programme.desc: The losing contestants from the team challenge are cooking to stay in the competition.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Mystery Box Challenge
programme.desc: It's power apron week on MasterChef Australia.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Pressure Test
programme.desc: The contestants with the three least impressive dishes from the invention test face off in the pressure test.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Immunity Challenge
programme.desc: An immunity challenge with a twist.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Elimination Challenge
programme.desc: Power Week. The elimination challenge will take place over two rounds.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Elimination Challenge
programme.desc: Power Week. The elimination challenge will take place over two rounds.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Mystery Box Challenge: Heston Blumenthal & Invention Test
programme.desc: Today's mystery box challenge has been set by the great Heston Blumenthal.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Pressure Test: Guillaume Brahimi's Jewel of the Sea
programme.desc: The judges reveal that the pressure test has been set by celebrated chef Guillaume Brahimi.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Immunity Challenge
programme.desc: Today the three contestants who impressed in Heston Blumenthal's invention test cook for immunity.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Off-site Challenge: Afternoon Tea at The Hotel Windsor
programme.desc: Two teams prepare afternoon tea for 100 guests at Melbourne's The Hotel Windsor.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - EP740
programme.desc: The five members of the losing team from yesterday's afternoon tea challenge enter the MasterChef Australia kitchen in what promises to be one of the most dramatic episodes of the season.

programme.title: Fear Factor USA - EP2
programme.desc: Fear Factor is the competition reality series in which contestants must face their fears.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA - The Bees Are So Angry
programme.desc: Five teams of two compete for $100,000 dollars on a five stunt, 2 hour spectacular.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA - Leeches & Shaved Heads & Tear Gas
programme.desc: In a special 2 hour Fear Factor five teams of 2 are bungeed off a cliff while tied under a helicopter.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA - Snake Bite
programme.desc: Four couples compete for a grand prize of $50,000.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA - Roach Coach
programme.desc: Four teams of two compete for $50,000 as they are locked in a cage and sunk underwater.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA - Broken Hearts & Blood Baths
programme.desc: Four teams of exes must deal with 3 stunts and each other.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA - Tall Crappacino
programme.desc: Four teams of two attempt to win $50,000.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA - Hee Haw! Hee Haw!
programme.desc: Four sets of twins compete for $50,000 as they are electric shocked.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA - Scorpion Tales
programme.desc: Four teams of family members compete for $50,000 as they careen into a quarry full of live ammunition.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - Southern Charm
programme.desc: Witness an ultimate television cliffhanger as Robert Evans fills the stage with southern charm.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - Monopoly Money
programme.desc: Real estate agent, Toni Miller is used to buying and selling hot properties.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - Hoop Dreams
programme.desc: Single mother and marathoner Monica Durazo comes from a sales background and a family of competitors.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - Father Knows Best
programme.desc: The Motor City, Detroit, brings one-of-a-kind father of five sons, John West, to the stage.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - Beard Or No Beard
programme.desc: Deal Or No Deal USA

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - My Big Fat Greek Game Show
programme.desc: George Stathoulis and his big Greek family take over the show in a plate-breaking and suspense filled game.
